name: Sarah
message: Hark, for I have stumbled upon this sacred corner of the web and found myself utterly transformed. M'lord Hariel, I bestow upon thee five stars, a standing ovation, and my eternal allegiance. This corner of the web is a treasure, and so are you.

name: Fox
message: Hi, old friend! I like what you did with the place! <3

name: Mike
message: You really worked on it a lot. Looks really nice!
